category_sources: source_facts.description says Spotify daemon; official README describes an open source Spotify client running as a UNIX daemon.
display_name_sources: Official README heading and docs site use Spotifyd.
docs_sources: Dedicated official docs domain docs.spotifyd.rs covers installation, setup, and advanced topics.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Spotifyd/spotifyd, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes a UNIX daemon, Spotify Connect support, and lightweight streaming; source_facts.executables lists spotifyd.
